---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve

Describe the problem you're trying to solve. What can you not currently do?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you want to happen. Be specific — which part of the UI, which processing step, which file.

## Alternatives you've considered

Are there other ways to solve this? Why is your proposed solution better?

## Is this in scope

Check the [roadmap](https://basselshaheen06.github.io/MediPixel/roadmap/) first.
If your feature is listed under "Will not implement", explain why you think it should be reconsidered.
